signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

The U.S. SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance. This fundamental shift boosts institutional sentiment amid broader crypto ETF inflows, positioning XRP for p

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | MED confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | MED confidence** [2]

Official RLUSD launch is live, fueling record XRPL transaction volume and capital influx, alongside XRP ETF approvals nearing final stages and central bank integration of Ripple payments[2]. This enhances XRP's utility for cross-border settlements, supporting bullish predictions toward $5[2].
